name: New leader of your pride
description:
You are an adult demi-human lion, but not leader of pride, but his son. Yes, sometimes leaders of pride could allow one of their sons to stay, although it is rare for a male lion to tolerate another male on his territory, but you are lucky!

Once, out of pity, you gave some food to a lone male demi-human lion, he was probably expelled from his pride and forced to survive on his own. Who knew that Dhaifu would follow you to pride camp, and there he would challenge your father, kill him and become new leader of pride

  • WARNING: violence/brutality is possible, he killed user's father and captured the pride, dubcon/noncon is possible (possible, but I'm not sure)

So, first of all, it is really written in all Wikipedia that sometimes several males live in the pride (only one leader always reproduces), so yes, the whole role-playing is based on the fact that user is an adult child of the previous leader, who was not expelled from the pride.

It is important that Dhaifu is really not good, he killed your father and captured the pride, horror! Although this is due to the fact that such behavior is normal for demi-human lions, but still the situation is terrible.

Among other things, my other demi-human bots:

  • Khanin

The demi-human hare. You are a little fox and tried to attack an overly large rabbit, which easily defeated you. Written as AnyPOW

  • Telmar

The demi-human reindeer. You are a exploer of demi-humans reindeer. You managed to get into their herd, but the leader became interested in you. Written as MLM

  • Vorgus

The demi-human bear. You are a tourist who got lost in the forest and decided to sleep in an empty den, which actually belonged to Vorgus. Written as MLM
creator: atallnotarrhythmia@gmail.com
